_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: We plated single spheres derived from wild type, Nf1+/−, and Nf1−/− DRG and assayed EGFR and P75 (a neural crest lineage marker) immunoreactivity. Spheres from all genotypes contained cells that coexpressed EGFR and P75
details: Successfully detected EGFR expression in spheres from all genotypes, with all spheres containing EGFR+;P75+ cells (n = 8 spheres from each of three embryos per genotype)
